{{nihongo|'''Yuge Shrine'''|弓削神社（八尾市弓削）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yuge Shrine'''|弓削神社（八尾市弓削）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yuge Shrine'''|弓削神社（八尾市弓削）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yuge Shrine'''|弓削神社（八尾市弓削）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].
